channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green or amber traffic light is not working problem, 8th May
item.description:
Customer has called today and says they have been involved with an incident this morning and has caused great concern. The pedestrians have been at the crossing and seen the red light opposite them, they have taken the opportunity to cross but ignored the crossing alerts (green man) and were unaware of green filter lights on their side. We have discussed this and unable to determine if this is fault with the signals or more of a judgement error on the pedestrians (I have suggested the latter). They would however like this to be passed to the appropriate department as this may happen again and could be a safety issue.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: Mattress fly tipped on Festival Way, 8th May
item.description:
Delivering here and noticed it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Aldridge Close, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 8th May
item.description:
FW abrupt level difference 2000mm x 300mm x 35mm Give and take TM Outside number 61 (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 8th May
item.description:
Overhanging tree branches Please arrange for low hanging tree branches to be cut back Standard TM with temp FW closure (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 8th May

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 8th May
item.description:
Branches are falling off, with pests inside. Rotten within.
Report on FixMyStreet
